## 🎯 CS 113 Learning Objectives Aligned

### Data Structures Evidence
✅ **ArrayList** — Generic collection management in spring API  
✅ **HashMap** — Key-value table mapping for flexible schema  
✅ **HashSet** — Unique collection storage patterns  
✅ **Queue** — Task/event queueing system  

### Algorithms Evidence
✅ **Sorting** — Comparable implementation for data ordering  
✅ **Searching** — API query & filter logic  

### OOP Evidence
✅ **Abstraction** — Role-based access control patterns  
✅ **Encapsulation** — Enum-based type safety  
✅ **Inheritance** — Class hierarchy design  
✅ **Polymorphism** — Method overriding & interface implementation  

### REST API Evidence
✅ **HTTP Methods** — GET/POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints  
✅ **Status Codes** — 200/201/404/409 responses  
✅ **Error Handling** — Exception & validation response patterns  

### Database Evidence
✅ **JPA Entities** — @Entity, @OneToMany, @ManyToMany relationships  
✅ **Repository Pattern** — Spring Data JPA repositories  

### Deployment Evidence
✅ **Docker** — Containerization & build process  

### Frontend Evidence
✅ **DOM Manipulation** — Calendar, modal, game components  
✅ **State Management** — Message system, game logic  
✅ **API Integration** — Frontend ↔ Backend communication
